caption: The video takes place in a recording studio setting. In the initial scene, a man wearing glasses, a white shirt with a bowtie, and a tall, spiked grey wig is speaking into a professional microphone. He wears headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with several framed photographs. A logo reading "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the screen. The scene then shifts to a different man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on it, a black baseball cap with "BOSS" text, and headphones. He is also speaking into a professional microphone while resting his chin on his hand. He wears a gold watch and necklace. Behind him, a white wall features the text "HUSTLE" and several gold stars. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" remains present throughout the subsequent shots of this man.
